Indeed<br/>Email: Gmail API<br/>LLM Providers: Groq / OpenAI / Anthropic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="355" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scout" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="<b>Scout</b><br/>Job discovery<br/>APIs + scraping" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="130" x="220" generation<br/>(LLM)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="130" x="410" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="<b>Auto Apply Worker</b><br/>Gmail logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="130" x="600" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dashboard" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="<b>Dashboard (Next.js 14 + Tailwind)</b><br/>Applications Tracker UI<br/>CV / Cover Letter Viewer<br/>Auth (NextAuth + Resend)<br/>Calls backend API" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="375" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="volume" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="<b>Shared Data Volume</b><br/>job-applications/<br/>tracker.csv<br/>CVs.md<br/>cover_letters.md<br/>generated_pdfs/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="400" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 45px; margin-left: 156px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
External Services
Job Boards: Adzuna / Reed / Indeed
Email: Gmail API
LLM Providers: Groq / OpenAI / Anthropic
